ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report Of Status
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Report Of Status
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Oct-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for Karen Melander-Magoon.

Ms. Fox stated that the estate is ready to be closed, that there has been litigation, but it's over, that her Client had a medical issue while in Sweden and had to remain there, that her Client is back and that she will file her petition in a month. Status on close of estate is continued to October 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that if she is not ready to file a petition for final distribution, she will need to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-14-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Continued To Jan-14-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia specially appearing for Deborah Fox on behalf of Petitioner.

The Court stated that a petition to close the estate or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is needed. Ms. Navia stated that Ms. Fox indicated that the order she received in June did not reflect today's status hearing and that she will file a report. Ms. Navia also stated that litigation is going on in Hawaii and that it is currently in the Appellate Court. Status on close of estate is continued to January 14, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Continued To May-22-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on May 22, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
